thesis_hint: Recent quality is improving on the strongest active branch (VVV funding snapback QScore 0.0900 -> 0.3182 -> 0.5323), so exploration is allowed. Target BABY 1h specifically because funding is extremely negative (-0.0077) with high open interest and volume; design a funding-squeeze long setup that only triggers after capitulation plus reclaim, with a hard trend-veto to avoid catching persistent bleed. Avoid low-trade filters and avoid pure knife-catching mean reversion.
stop_condition: Stop when any variant reaches QScore >= 1.0 with >= 20 trades and max_drawdown_pct <= 8.0; abort any variant with total_trades < 15, profit_factor < 1.08, or trending regime profit_factor < 0.95.
